emails.subject: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: Would you send a draft copy of our Confidentiality Agreement to the Texas General Land Office via email by Tuesday, September 11. Here is the information: Texas General Land Office Stephen F. Austin Building 1700 North Congress Avenue, Suite 640 Attn: In-Kind-Marketing Austin, Texas 78701-1495 Attn: J. David Hall Please email to: david.hall@glo.state.tx.us richard.bone@glo.state.tx.us If you have any questions, please contact me at X36784.

emails.subject: RE: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: RE: Confidentiality Agreement Gary, Can you give me a scope of the issues we need to address in this CA. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: We are planning to review transportation agreements, storage agreements and gas purchase type agreements. The idea is to look at outsourcing, managing and providing various services to the In-kind program for the state. Does that information cover what you need for the agreement?
